sf-row: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 48px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--divider);
sf-btn: margin-top: 12px; height: 48px; background: var(--cta); color: #fff; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700;
genius-chip: background: var(--yellow); color: var(--blue); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 500px;
prop-photo: width: 96px; height: 116px; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
prop-info: flex: 1; min-width: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
score-row: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-top: 6px;
score-badge: background: var(--blue); color: #fff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; padding: 4px 7px; border-radius: 5px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
price-now: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
